mapper.select:
select distinct WORD_ID ,WORD_NM ,WORD_ENG_ABRV_NM ,WORD_ENG_NM ,WORD_DESC ,WORD_CLSF_YN ,DOMAIN_CLSF_NM ,ALLOPH_SYNM_LST ,FORBDN_WORD_LST ,COMM_STND_YN ,MAGNTD_ORD ,APRV_YN ,APRV_USER_ID ,CRET_DT ,CRET_USER_ID ,UPDT_DT ,UPDT_USER_ID ,APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT ,REQ_SYS_CD ,REQ_SYS_NM from ( select WORD_ID ,WORD_NM ,WORD_ENG_ABRV_NM ,WORD_ENG_NM ,WORD_DESC ,WORD_CLSF_YN ,DOMAIN_CLSF_NM ,ALLOPH_SYNM_LST ,FORBDN_WORD_LST ,COMM_STND_YN ,MAGNTD_ORD ,APRV_YN ,APRV_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as CRET_DT ,CRET_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as UPDT_DT ,UPDT_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT ,REQ_SYS_CD ,(select SYS_NM from TB_SYS_INFO where sys_cd = REQ_SYS_CD) as REQ_SYS_NM ,UNNEST(CASE WHEN array_length(ALLOPH_SYNM_LST, 1) >= 1 THEN ALLOPH_SYNM_LST ELSE '{null}'::text[] END ) as ALLOPH_SYNM from TB_WORD ) A where 1=1
AND (A.WORD_NM like '%' || #{schNm} || '%' OR A.ALLOPH_SYNM like '%' || #{schNm} || '%')
AND A.WORD_ENG_ABRV_NM like '%' || #{searchEngWord} || '%'
AND A.APRV_YN = #{schAprvYn}
order by A.WORD_NM

select distinct WORD_ID ,WORD_NM ,WORD_ENG_ABRV_NM ,WORD_ENG_NM ,WORD_DESC ,WORD_CLSF_YN ,DOMAIN_CLSF_NM ,ALLOPH_SYNM_LST ,FORBDN_WORD_LST ,COMM_STND_YN ,MAGNTD_ORD ,APRV_YN ,APRV_USER_ID ,CRET_DT ,CRET_USER_ID ,UPDT_DT ,UPDT_USER_ID ,APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT ,REQ_SYS_CD ,REQ_SYS_NM from ( select WORD_ID ,WORD_NM ,WORD_ENG_ABRV_NM ,WORD_ENG_NM ,WORD_DESC ,WORD_CLSF_YN ,DOMAIN_CLSF_NM ,ALLOPH_SYNM_LST ,FORBDN_WORD_LST ,COMM_STND_YN ,MAGNTD_ORD ,APRV_YN ,APRV_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as CRET_DT ,CRET_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as UPDT_DT ,UPDT_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT ,REQ_SYS_CD ,(select SYS_NM from TB_SYS_INFO where sys_cd = REQ_SYS_CD) as REQ_SYS_NM ,UNNEST(CASE WHEN array_length(ALLOPH_SYNM_LST, 1) >= 1 THEN ALLOPH_SYNM_LST ELSE '{null}'::text[] END ) as ALLOPH_SYNM from TB_WORD ) A where A.WORD_NM = #{wordNm} OR A.ALLOPH_SYNM = #{wordNm}

select WORD_ID ,WORD_NM ,WORD_ENG_ABRV_NM ,WORD_ENG_NM ,WORD_DESC ,WORD_CLSF_YN ,DOMAIN_CLSF_NM ,ALLOPH_SYNM_LST ,FORBDN_WORD_LST ,COMM_STND_YN ,MAGNTD_ORD ,APRV_YN ,APRV_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as CRET_DT ,CRET_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as UPDT_DT ,UPDT_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT ,REQ_SYS_CD ,(select SYS_NM from TB_SYS_INFO where sys_cd = REQ_SYS_CD) as REQ_SYS_NM from TB_WORD where WORD_ID = #{id}

select WORD_ID ,WORD_NM ,WORD_ENG_ABRV_NM ,WORD_ENG_NM ,WORD_DESC ,WORD_CLSF_YN ,DOMAIN_CLSF_NM ,ALLOPH_SYNM_LST ,FORBDN_WORD_LST ,COMM_STND_YN ,MAGNTD_ORD ,APRV_YN ,APRV_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as CRET_DT ,CRET_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as UPDT_DT ,UPDT_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT ,REQ_SYS_CD ,(select SYS_NM from TB_SYS_INFO where sys_cd = REQ_SYS_CD) as REQ_SYS_NM from TB_WORD where WORD_NM = #{wordNm} OR #{wordNm} = any(ALLOPH_SYNM_LST)

select WORD_ID ,WORD_NM ,WORD_ENG_ABRV_NM ,WORD_ENG_NM ,WORD_DESC ,WORD_CLSF_YN ,DOMAIN_CLSF_NM ,ALLOPH_SYNM_LST ,FORBDN_WORD_LST ,COMM_STND_YN ,MAGNTD_ORD ,APRV_YN ,APRV_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as CRET_DT ,CRET_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as UPDT_DT ,UPDT_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT ,REQ_SYS_CD ,(select SYS_NM from TB_SYS_INFO where sys_cd = REQ_SYS_CD) as REQ_SYS_NM from TB_WORD where WORD_ENG_ABRV_NM = #{wordEngAbrvNm}

select A.WORD_ID ,A.WORD_NM ,A.WORD_ENG_ABRV_NM ,A.WORD_ENG_NM ,A.WORD_DESC ,A.WORD_CLSF_YN ,A.DOMAIN_CLSF_NM ,A.ALLOPH_SYNM_LST ,A.FORBDN_WORD_LST ,A.COMM_STND_YN ,A.MAGNTD_ORD ,A.APRV_YN ,A.APRV_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(A.CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as CRET_DT ,A.CRET_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(A.UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as UPDT_DT ,A.UPDT_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(A.APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT from TB_WORD A inner join (select * from TB_TERMS_WORDS where TERMS_ID = #{termsId}) B on A.WORD_ID = B.WORD_ID order by B.WORD_ORD

SELECT DISTINCT t.TERMS_NM FROM TB_TERMS_WORDS tw JOIN TB_TERMS t ON tw.TERMS_ID = t.TERMS_ID WHERE tw.WORD_ID IN
#{item.id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM TB_WORD WHERE WORD_ID IN
#{item.id}
